authors: William Fedus; Barret Zoph; Noam Shazeer

authors: Elias Frantar; Saleh Ashkboos; Torsten Hoefler; Dan Alistarh

title: AWQ: Activation-aware Weight Quantization for LLM Compression and Acceleration
limitations: activation salience is not causal proof; hardware kernels matter

Tensorizing Neural Networks

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
limitations: retriever quality and provenance remain hard

title: LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models

title: Locating and Editing Factual Associations in GPT
authors: Kevin Meng; David Bau; Alex Andonian; Yonatan Belinkov

title: The Curse of Recursion: Training on Generated Data Makes Models Forget
method: model collapse from recursive generated data
relevance: supports trust hierarchy and synthetic-data controls

title: DwarfStar DS4
method: DeepSeek V4 local inference; routed expert quantization; imatrix; SSD expert streaming
limitations: narrow engine; beta quality; model-specific GGUF tooling; DS4-scale GPU results not reproduced here
relevance: source case study for H3 selective precision and H4 routed expert execution

title: sshleifer/tiny-gpt2

limitations: tiny model; skinny tensors; useful only as a smoke-test checkpoint source, not production-scale language-model evidence
